h1.visual_description: Not present in this sample page; likely large, bold, and centered or left-aligned on chapter start pages.

h2.visual_description: Not present in this sample page; likely bold and slightly larger than body text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption; italicized text centered below an image or screenshot.
Footer; contains the page number followed by a list of author names in all-caps.
Specific designator or tag used within the text (e.g., #NOLO).

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Inferred institutional/academic report style (e.g., APA or Chicago).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running footer at the bottom of the page containing page numbers and author credits.
